trans-unit.target: Your review must at least %min% characters long.
Your comment has been posted. It will appear on the site in a few minutes.

Write your analysis of the card, in at least %min% characters. You can write a number of card reviews equal to your reputation. This is not a place for questions or comments. Type # to enter a card name. Type $ to enter a symbol.
No review yet for this card.
Your review has been posted. It will appear on the site in a few minutes.
Reviews will be enabled for this card when it is officially released.
Are you sure you want to add cards and dice from %pack% of %set%? You will need to save the changes after this.
%cards% card throughout the game meets this filter. | %cards% cards throughout the game meet this filter.
Find a card or filter the list
Shift+Click to select only one option ; Alt+Shift+Click to select all other options
Showing %cards% card out of %total% in my collection. | Showing %cards% cards out of %total% in my collection.
Showing %cards% card out of %total% in the game. | Showing %cards% cards out of %total% in the game.
Unable to load the data. Click here to reload your page.
Enter text to search in name
Derived from (copy id or address of the decklist this one is inspired from)
Turn a card name into a card link
Press # to insert a card name, $ to insert a game symbol.
To prevent spam, accounts cannot publish more decklists than their reputation per 24 hours.
To prevent spam, newly created accounts must wait 24 hours before being allowed to publish a decklist.
This deck cannot be published because it is invalid.
You don't have access to this decklist.
You cannot publish this deck yet, because it has unreleased cards.
This deck has already been published before. You are going to create a duplicate.
Enter your comment in Markdown format. Type # to enter a card name. Type $ to enter a symbol. Type @ to enter a user name.
Your comment has been posted. It will appear on the site in a few minutes.
Create the deck and start building
{1} Display on 1 column | ]1, Inf] Display on %cols% columns
{0} Show no suggestion | {1} Show %count% suggestion | ]1, Inf] Show %count% suggestions
Find a card or filter the list
Shift+Click to select only one option ; Alt+Shift+Click to select all other options
Type # to enter a card name. Type $ to enter a symbol.
Tags are for easy filtering in your list of decks, e.g. competitive or fun.
This deck has unsaved changes. Please save the deck or cancel the changes before making further edits.
Click to switch to this tag. Shift-click to toggle this tag.
Are you sure you want to delete the deck %name%?
Are you sure you want to delete all the decks selected?
Are you sure you want to clear all tags from the selected decks?
Please enter the list of tags, separated by spaces
Contains cards from one missing color
Contains too many copies of a card
Click to draw; Shift-click to reset and draw
Odds to have at least 1 copy of a desired card, after having drawn that many cards from the deck, depending of the number of copies in the deck (1 - 2)
Example: <tt>f:red o<3 d:1</tt> shows all Red cards with a die and cost fewer than 3.
How many of its dice I owned
%author% mentionned you on a comment in the decklist %decklist%
To unsubscribe from those notifications, change your account settings.
After playing this card, you may immediately take one additional action.
After a character with Guardian is activated, its controller may deal it damage equal to the value of a die showing damage in an opponent’s dice pool. Then remove that die.
After the attached character is defeated, you may immediately move this upgrade to any of your other characters. The upgrade die moves to the new character card, even if it was in your dice pool.
After activating this card, you may place 1 charm token on a character.
{0} You don't have this card in your collection | {1} You only have one card in your collection | [2,Inf] You only h ave %count% cards in your collection
You must be logged in for this operation.
{0} There is no cards | {1} One card | ]1,Inf] %count% cards
Select a faction color for your username
Be notified when a user comments one of your decklists
Be notified when a user also comments a decklist you commented
Be notified when a user mentions you in a comment
If you check this box, the "View" page of your decks will be public instead of private. You can then send the link to your friends. If you uncheck the box, all your decks become private immediately.
{0} No published decklist | {1} One published decklist | ]1,Inf] %count% published decklists
{0} No published review | {1} One published review | ]1,Inf] %count% published reviews
Your query didn't match any card.
Modified and adapted to SW Destiny by fafranco82.
Please post bug reports and feature requests on %link%.
You may contribute by giving money on %link%.

The information presented on this site about Star Wars Destiny, both literal and graphical, is copyrighted by Fantasy Flight Games. This website is not produced, endorsed, supported, or affiliated with Fantasy Flight Games.
Decks are awesome. You can Edit them until you're satisfied, then Publish them for others to discuss. And if you want to keep to yourself, you can still Download them or Export them.
So what are you waiting for? To create your first deck, you can either Build one from scratch using the Deckbuilder, Import one from the web, or Upload a deck file in simple text format.

We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information you’ve provided to them or they’ve collected from your use of their services.
There are more than one card from restricted list in the deck
The card has been banned in this format
The card has been errata'd in this specific format
After a character with Piloting is activated, its controller may choose a vehicle they control and activate it. That character is piloting that vehicle. Piloting expires at the end of the round.
After this card is activated, reveal a random non-detected card in an opponent’s hand. That card remains revealed until the end of the action phase and is Detected.
You may play this card from your discard pile for its Renew cost. Then set it aside.
